Summarize this passage in exactly one sentence:

"The semantic router routes prompts to language models based on classified intent. It uses fast keyword heuristics first, falls back to embedding similarity for ambiguous prompts, and uses a small LLM classifier as a last resort. Routing decisions are logged with full signal scores so the router can learn from outcomes over time."
judge_criteria: Captures: (1) routing by intent, (2) the three-tier classifier cascade, (3) learning from logged outcomes. Single sentence. Not a verbatim copy.
